name: WNS (Holdings) Limited
description: WNS (Holdings) Limited is a leading global business process management (BPM) and digital transformation company that partners with over 700 clients across diverse industries. By blending deep domain expertise with advanced AI-powered platforms, analytics, and data solutions, WNS helps organizations innovate, scale, and adapt to complex market disruptions. The company provides comprehensive services, including finance and accounting, customer experience, procurement, and industry-specific operational support, through a global delivery model. Committed to sustainable outcomes, WNS designs intelligent, human-led solutions that drive lasting business value and operational excellence for enterprises worldwide.
